    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    For launching the GUI
    makeAngryFace() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes a face using three Circles and an Arc for the frown.
    makeCook(Tab, Tab) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes the cook tab which allows you to assemble the burger from chosen ingredients.
    makeEODscreen(Tab, Tab, Tab, Tab, Tab) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes tab for end of day screen.
    makeFlatFace() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes a face using three Circles and a Line for the mouth.
    makeOrder(Tab) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes the order tab screen.
    makePrep(Tab) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes the prep tab, which includes a basket for picking ingredients and oven for grilling patties.
    makeServe(Tab, Tab, Tab) - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes tab for serving screen.
    makeSmileyFace() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes a smiley face using three Circles and an Arc for the smile.
    makeTicketInfos() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes a VBox holding both Tickets.
    makeUpsetFace() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantGUIView
    Makes a face using three Circles and an Arc for the frown.
    MaraihTest() - Method in class Unit_Tests.customerTest
     
    Mariah - Class in RestaurantGame
     
    Mariah() - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.Mariah
    Constructor that creates a Mariah customer with predefined attributes.
    milestones() - Method in class RestaurantGame.Player
    get the players daily milestones based on the number of customers served, streak of perfect accuracy, and streak of perfect timing days and adds points to the score
    milestonesTest() - Method in class Unit_Tests.PlayerTest
     
    model - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
     
    money - Variable in class RestaurantGame.Player
